001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.commons.inject;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.ReflectionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
022
023import java.util.*;
024import java.util.concurrent.*;
025import java.util.function.*;
026import java.util.logging.*;
027
028import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.commons.settings.*;
031
032/**
033 * Basic implementation of {@link WritableBeanStore}.
034 *
035 * <p>
036 * A simple storage database for beans keyed by type and name.
037 * Used to retrieve and instantiate beans using an injection-like API.
038 * It's similar in concept to the injection framework of Spring but greatly simplified in function and not intended to implement a full-fledged injection framework.
039 *
040 * <p>
041 * Beans can be stored with or without names.  Named beans are typically resolved using
042 * the <ja>@Name</ja> or <ja>@Qualified</ja> annotations on constructor or method parameters.
043 *
044 * <p>
045 * This implementation is thread-safe and supports parent bean stores for hierarchical bean resolution.
046 *
047 * <h5 class='section'>Resolution order:</h5>
048 * <p>
049 * Bean lookups consult the following sources in this order, returning the first match:
050 * <ol>
051 *    <li>{@linkplain #BasicBeanStore(BeanStore,BeanStore) Overriding parent} (e.g. a Spring application context bridge), if non-{@code null}.
052 *    <li>Local entries added via {@link #addBean(Class,Object) addBean} / {@link #addSupplier(Class,Supplier) addSupplier}.
053 *    <li>Regular {@linkplain #BasicBeanStore(BeanStore) parent}, if non-{@code null}.
054 *    <li>Local default suppliers added via {@link #addDefaultSupplier(Class,Supplier) addDefaultSupplier} (memoizer-backed framework defaults).
055 * </ol>
056 *
057 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
058 *    <li class='jc'>{@link BeanStore} - Read-only bean lookup interface
059 *    <li class='jc'>{@link WritableBeanStore} - Writable bean store interface
060 * </ul>
061 */
062@SuppressWarnings({
063   "java:S115",  // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention (e.g., PROP_bean)
064   "java:S135",  // @PreDestroy/@Bean discovery loops use per-element continue guards for clarity; refactoring obscures the per-annotation filter chain
065   "java:S3011", // setAccessible(true) is required to invoke private/package-private @Bean members and @PreDestroy methods via reflection
066   "java:S3776", // matchesConditions and registerConfiguration intentionally centralize the @Conditional/@Bean discovery state machine; splitting hurts cohesion
067   "resource" // BeanStore is a fluent AutoCloseable; self-returns and owned/sentinel stores are not new resources to close.
068})
069public class BasicBeanStore implements WritableBeanStore {
070   private static final Logger LOGGER = Logger.getLogger(BasicBeanStore.class.getName());
071
072   /**
073    * Static reusable empty instance.
074    *
075    * <p>
076    * Useful as a placeholder when an API requires a {@link BeanStore} but the caller has no beans to
077    * register &mdash; e.g. as the parent argument to a builder that only needs the bean store for
078    * downstream parameter resolution.
079    *
080    * <p>
081    * <b>Treat this instance as read-only.</b>  It's typed as the concrete class so it can be passed
082    * to APIs that take {@link WritableBeanStore} or {@code BasicBeanStore}, but callers should not
083    * call any mutating methods on it &mdash; doing so would leak state between unrelated callers.
084    * Code that legitimately needs to add beans should construct its own {@code new BasicBeanStore()}.
085    */
086   public static final BasicBeanStore INSTANCE = new BasicBeanStore();
087
088   // Property name constants
089   private static final String PROP_bean = "bean";
090   private static final String PROP_defaults = "defaults";
091   private static final String PROP_entries = "entries";
092   private static final String PROP_identity = "identity";
093   private static final String PROP_name = "name";
094   private static final String PROP_overlayStack = "overlayStack";
095   private static final String PROP_overridingParent = "overridingParent";
096   private static final String PROP_parent = "parent";
097   private static final String PROP_type = "type";
098
099   private final ConcurrentHashMap<Class<?>, ConcurrentHashMap<String, Supplier<?>>> entries;
100   private final ConcurrentHashMap<Class<?>, ConcurrentHashMap<String, Supplier<?>>> defaults;
101   private final ConcurrentHashMap<Class<?>, ConcurrentHashMap<String, BeanSourceMeta>> entryMetadata;
102   private final ConcurrentHashMap<Class<?>, ConcurrentHashMap<String, BeanSourceMeta>> defaultMetadata;
103   private final ConcurrentHashMap<Class<?>, Class<?>> typeBindings;
104   private final List<Object> resolvedBeans;
105   private final Set<Object> resolvedIdentities;
106   private final Set<Class<?>> registeredConfigurations;
107   private final BeanStore parent;
108   private final BeanStore overridingParent;
109   @SuppressWarnings({
110      "java:S3077" // volatile is required here for correct double-checked-locking safe-publication of the lazily-created StackOverlay in pushOverlay(); the reference is publish-once and never compound-mutated.
111   })
112   private volatile StackOverlay overlayStack;
113   private volatile boolean closed;
114
115   /**
116    * No-arg constructor.  Equivalent to {@code new BasicBeanStore(null)}.
117    *
118    * <p>
119    * Creates a standalone, parent-less bean store.  All lookups consult only locally-registered beans and
120    * default suppliers.
121    */
122   public BasicBeanStore() {
123      this(null, null);
124   }
125
126   /**
127    * Constructor.
128    *
129    * @param parent The parent bean store.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.  Bean searches are performed recursively up this parent chain
130    *    <i>after</i> local entries are checked.
131    */
132   public BasicBeanStore(BeanStore parent) {
133      this(parent, null);
134   }
135
136   /**
137    * Constructor that accepts an overriding parent bean store.
138    *
139    * <p>
140    * The {@code overridingParent} is consulted <i>before</i> any local entries during bean lookup, allowing an outer
141    * scope (typically a Spring {@code ApplicationContext} bridge) to take precedence over local registrations.  The
142    * regular {@code parent} continues to be consulted as a fallback after local entries.
143    *
144    * <p>
145    * Final resolution order:
146    * <ol>
147    *    <li>{@code overridingParent} (if non-{@code null})
148    *    <li>local entries (added via {@link #addBean(Class,Object) addBean} / {@link #addSupplier(Class,Supplier) addSupplier})
149    *    <li>regular {@code parent} (if non-{@code null})
150    *    <li>local default suppliers (added via {@link #addDefaultSupplier(Class,Supplier) addDefaultSupplier})
151    * </ol>
152    *
153    * @param parent The parent bean store, used as a fallback after local entries.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
154    * @param overridingParent The overriding parent bean store, consulted before local entries.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
155    */
156   public BasicBeanStore(BeanStore parent, BeanStore overridingParent) {
157      this.parent = parent;
158      this.overridingParent = overridingParent;
159      entries = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
160      defaults = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
161      entryMetadata = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
162      defaultMetadata = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
163      typeBindings = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
164      resolvedBeans = Collections.synchronizedList(new ArrayList<>());
165      resolvedIdentities = Collections.newSetFromMap(new IdentityHashMap<>());
166      registeredConfigurations = Collections.synchronizedSet(new HashSet<>());
167      addSupplier(BasicBeanStore.class, ()->this, null);
168      addSupplier(BeanStore.class, ()->this, null);
169      addSupplier(WritableBeanStore.class, ()->this, null);
170   }
171
172   /**
173    * Same as {@link #addBean(Class,Object)} but returns the bean instead of this object for fluent calls.
174    *
175    * @param <T> The class to associate this bean with.
176    * @param beanType The class to associate this bean with.
177    * @param bean The bean.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
178    * @return The bean.
179    */
180   @Override
181   public <T> T add(Class<T> beanType, T bean) {
182      add(beanType, bean, null);
183      return bean;
184   }
185
186   /**
187    * Same as {@link #addBean(Class,Object,String)} but returns the bean instead of this object for fluent calls.
188    *
189    * @param <T> The class to associate this bean with.
190    * @param beanType The class to associate this bean with.
191    * @param bean The bean.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
192    * @param name The bean name if this is a named bean.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
193    * @return The bean.
194    */
195   @Override
196   public <T> T add(Class<T> beanType, T bean, String name) {
197      addBean(beanType, bean, name);
198      return bean;
199   }
200
201   /**
202    * Adds an unnamed bean of the specified type to this store.
203    *
204    * @param <T> The class to associate this bean with.
205    * @param beanType The class to associate this bean with.
206    * @param bean The bean.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
207    * @return This object.
208    */
209   @Override
210   public <T> BasicBeanStore addBean(Class<T> beanType, T bean) {
211      return addBean(beanType, bean, null);
212   }
213
214   /**
215    * Adds a named bean of the specified type to this store.
216    *
217    * @param <T> The class to associate this bean with.
218    * @param beanType The class to associate this bean with.
219    * @param bean The bean.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
220    * @param name The bean name if this is a named bean.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
221    * @return This object.
222    */
223   @Override
224   public <T> BasicBeanStore addBean(Class<T> beanType, T bean, String name) {
225      return addSupplier(beanType, () -> bean, name);
226   }
227
228   /**
229    * Adds a supplier for an unnamed bean of the specified type to this store.
230    *
231    * <p>
232    * The supplier will be invoked lazily when the bean is first requested.
233    *
234    * @param <T> The class to associate this bean with.
235    * @param beanType The class to associate this bean with.
236    * @param bean The bean supplier.
237    * @return This object.
238    */
239   @Override
240   public <T> BasicBeanStore addSupplier(Class<T> beanType, Supplier<T> bean) {
241      return addSupplier(beanType, bean, null);
242   }
243
244   /**
245    * Adds a supplier for a named bean of the specified type to this store.
246    *
247    * <p>
248    * The supplier will be invoked lazily when the bean is first requested.
249    *
250    * @param <T> The class to associate this bean with.
251    * @param beanType The class to associate this bean with.
252    * @param bean The bean supplier.
253    * @param name The bean name if this is a named bean.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
254    * @return This object.
255    */
256   @Override
257   public <T> BasicBeanStore addSupplier(Class<T> beanType, Supplier<T> bean, String name) {
258      checkOpen();
259      var typeMap = entries.computeIfAbsent(beanType, k -> new ConcurrentHashMap<>());
260      var key = emptyIfNull(name);
261      typeMap.put(key, bean);
262      entryMetadata.computeIfAbsent(beanType, k -> new ConcurrentHashMap<>()).put(key, BeanSourceMeta.DEFAULT);
263      return this;
264   }
265
266   /**
267    * Adds a fallback supplier for an unnamed bean of the specified type to this store.
268    *
269    * <p>
270    * Default suppliers are consulted only after local {@linkplain #addBean(Class,Object) entries} and the regular
271    * {@linkplain #BasicBeanStore(BeanStore) parent} have been searched.  They are intended for memoizer-backed
272    * framework defaults that should not shadow explicit user registrations or beans inherited from an
273    * {@linkplain #BasicBeanStore(BeanStore,BeanStore) overriding parent} (e.g. Spring).
274    *
275    * @param <T> The bean type.
276    * @param beanType The bean type.
277    * @param supplier The bean supplier.
278    * @return This object.
279    */
280   @Override
281   public <T> BasicBeanStore addDefaultSupplier(Class<T> beanType, Supplier<T> supplier) {
282      return addDefaultSupplier(beanType, supplier, null);
283   }
284
285   /**
286    * Adds a fallback supplier for a named bean of the specified type to this store.
287    *
288    * <p>
289    * See {@link #addDefaultSupplier(Class,Supplier)} for ordering semantics.
290    *
291    * @param <T> The bean type.
292    * @param beanType The bean type.
293    * @param supplier The bean supplier.
294    * @param name The bean name.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
295    * @return This object.
296    */
297   @Override
298   public <T> BasicBeanStore addDefaultSupplier(Class<T> beanType, Supplier<T> supplier, String name) {
299      checkOpen();
300      var typeMap = defaults.computeIfAbsent(beanType, k -> new ConcurrentHashMap<>());
301      var key = emptyIfNull(name);
302      typeMap.put(key, supplier);
303      defaultMetadata.computeIfAbsent(beanType, k -> new ConcurrentHashMap<>()).put(key, BeanSourceMeta.DEFAULT);
304      return this;
305   }
306
307   /**
308    * Promotes every locally-registered default supplier to a local entry supplier of the same name and type.
309    *
310    * <p>
311    * Default suppliers normally resolve at tier 4 (after the regular parent walk), which means a parent
312    * store's default supplier wins over this store's default supplier when both are registered for the same
313    * type.  Promoting moves each default into the tier-2 local-entry slot so that this store's framework
314    * defaults take precedence over the parent's same-type defaults &mdash; useful for embedded sub-contexts
315    * (e.g. per-mixin {@code RestContext}s) that need their own framework objects (serializer set, parser set,
316    * call logger, etc.) even though the parent is parent-linked for non-framework bean lookups.
317    *
318    * <p>
319    * The original default-supplier registrations are left in place; promoted entries that already exist as
320    * local entries are not overwritten.  Promotion is idempotent and only affects suppliers registered prior
321    * to the call &mdash; later {@code addDefaultSupplier(...)} calls do not retroactively promote.
322    *
323    * @return This object.
324    * @since 10.0.0
325    */
326   public BasicBeanStore promoteDefaultsToLocalSuppliers() {
327      checkOpen();
328      defaults.forEach((beanType, typeMap) -> typeMap.forEach((name, supplier) -> {
329         var localTypeMap = entries.computeIfAbsent(beanType, k -> new ConcurrentHashMap<>());
330         localTypeMap.putIfAbsent(name, supplier);
331         entryMetadata.computeIfAbsent(beanType, k -> new ConcurrentHashMap<>()).putIfAbsent(name, BeanSourceMeta.DEFAULT);
332      }));
333      return this;
334   }
335
336   @Override
337   public Snapshot pushOverlay(BeanStore overlay) {
338      Objects.requireNonNull(overlay, "overlay must not be null");
339      checkOpen();
340      var stack = overlayStack;
341      if (stack == null) {
342         synchronized (this) {
343            stack = overlayStack;
344            if (stack == null) {
345               stack = new StackOverlay();
346               overlayStack = stack;
347            }
348         }
349      }
350      stack.push(overlay);
351      return new Snapshot(this, overlay);
352   }
353
354   @Override
355   public void popOverlay(Snapshot snapshot) {
356      Objects.requireNonNull(snapshot, "snapshot must not be null");
357      checkOpen();
358      if (snapshot.owner() != this)
359         throw new IllegalStateException("Snapshot does not belong to this BeanStore (foreign-snapshot pop).");
360      var stack = overlayStack;
361      if (stack == null || stack.depth() == 0)
362         throw new IllegalStateException("popOverlay invoked on an empty overlay stack.");
363      // LIFO discipline — the snapshot must identify the current top-of-stack frame.
364      var top = stack.peek();
365      if (top != snapshot.frame())
366         throw new IllegalStateException(
367            "Out-of-order popOverlay: supplied snapshot does not identify the top-of-stack overlay frame.");
368      stack.pop();
369   }
370
371   /**
372    * Removes all beans from this store.
373    *
374    * <p>
375    * This operation only affects this store and does not affect the parent bean store.
376    *
377    * @return This object.
378    */
379   @Override
380   public BasicBeanStore clear() {
381      checkOpen();
382      entries.clear();
383      defaults.clear();
384      entryMetadata.clear();
385      defaultMetadata.clear();
386      registeredConfigurations.clear();
387      return this;
388   }
389
390   /**
391    * Returns the unnamed bean of the specified type.
392    *
393    * <p>
394    * If no unnamed bean is found in this store, searches the parent store recursively.
395    *
396    * @param <T> The type of bean to return.
397    * @param beanType The type of bean to return.
398    * @return The bean, or {@link Optional#empty()} if not found.
399    */
400   @Override
401   public <T> Optional<T> getBean(Class<T> beanType) {
402      return getBean(beanType, null);
403   }
404
405
406   /**
407    * Returns the named bean of the specified type.
408    *
409    * <p>
410    * If no bean with the specified name is found in this store, searches the parent store recursively.
411    *
412    * @param <T> The type of bean to return.
413    * @param beanType The type of bean to return.
414    * @param name The bean name.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
415    * @return The bean, or {@link Optional#empty()} if not found.
416    */
417   @Override
418   public <T> Optional<T> getBean(Class<T> beanType, String name) {
419      checkOpen();
420      if (name == null) {
421         var unnamed = resolve(beanType, null).map(Supplier::get);
422         if (unnamed.isPresent())
423            return unnamed.map(this::trackResolved);
424         return selectPrimary(beanType).map(this::trackResolved);
425      }
426      return resolve(beanType, name).map(Supplier::get).map(this::trackResolved);
427   }
428
429   /**
430    * Returns all beans of the specified type, keyed by bean name.
431    *
432    * <p>
433    * The map keys are the bean names (empty string for unnamed beans), and the values are the bean instances.
434    * Results from the parent store are included first, then beans from this store (which override parent beans with the same name).
435    *
436    * @param <T> The bean type.
437    * @param beanType The bean type.
438    * @return A map of bean names to bean instances.  Never <jk>null</jk>.
439    */
440   @Override
441   @SuppressWarnings({
442      "unchecked" // Type erasure requires cast to Map<String,T>
443   })
444   public <T> Map<String,T> getBeansOfType(Class<T> beanType) {
445      checkOpen();
446      // Build the result respecting the priority order used by getBean / resolve:
447      //   defaults (lowest) < parent < entries (local) < overridingParent < overlayStack (highest)
448      // Higher-priority maps overwrite lower-priority ones with the same name.
449      Map<String,T> result = map();
450      var defaultMap = defaults.get(beanType);
451      if (nn(defaultMap))
452         defaultMap.forEach((name, supplier) -> result.put(name, (T)supplier.get()));
453      if (nn(parent))
454         parent.getBeansOfType(beanType).forEach(result::put);
455      var typeMap = entries.get(beanType);
456      if (nn(typeMap))
457         typeMap.forEach((name, supplier) -> result.put(name, (T)supplier.get()));
458      if (nn(overridingParent))
459         overridingParent.getBeansOfType(beanType).forEach(result::put);
460      var stack = overlayStack;
461      if (nn(stack) && stack.depth() > 0)
462         stack.getBeansOfType(beanType).forEach(result::put);
463      if (result.isEmpty())
464         return result;
465      return result.entrySet().stream()
466         .sorted(Comparator.comparingInt(e -> beanOrder(beanType, e.getKey())))
467         .collect(LinkedHashMap::new, (m, e) -> m.put(e.getKey(), trackResolved(e.getValue())), Map::putAll);
468   }
469
470   /**
471    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if this store has a default supplier registered locally for the specified unnamed bean type.
472    *
473    * <p>
474    * Parent and overriding-parent stores are <i>not</i> consulted.
475    *
476    * @param beanType The bean type to check.
477    * @return <jk>true</jk> if a default supplier for the unnamed bean type is registered on this store.
478    */
479   @Override
480   public boolean hasDefaultSupplier(Class<?> beanType) {
481      return hasDefaultSupplier(beanType, null);
482   }
483
484   /**
485    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if this store has a default supplier registered locally for the specified bean type and name.
486    *
487    * <p>
488    * Parent and overriding-parent stores are <i>not</i> consulted.
489    *
490    * @param beanType The bean type to check.
491    * @param name The bean name.  Can be <jk>null</jk> for unnamed beans.
492    * @return <jk>true</jk> if a default supplier for the bean type and name is registered on this store.
493    */
494   @Override
495   public boolean hasDefaultSupplier(Class<?> beanType, String name) {
496      var typeMap = defaults.get(beanType);
497      return nn(typeMap) && typeMap.containsKey(emptyIfNull(name));
498   }
499
500   /**
501    * Returns the default supplier registered locally for the specified unnamed bean type, or empty if none.
502    *
503    * <p>
504    * Parent and overriding-parent stores are <i>not</i> consulted.  This returns the supplier itself,
505    * unwrapped from any resolution chain &mdash; it lets callers promote a memoizer-backed default
506    * supplier into a higher-precedence layer (e.g. a local entry) without re-invoking the underlying
507    * factory.
508    *
509    * @param <T> The bean type.
510    * @param beanType The bean type to look up.
511    * @return The locally-registered default supplier, or {@link Optional#empty()} if not present.
512    */
513   public <T> Optional<Supplier<T>> getDefaultSupplier(Class<T> beanType) {
514      return getDefaultSupplier(beanType, null);
515   }
516
517   /**
518    * Returns the default supplier registered locally for the specified bean type and name, or empty if none.
519    *
520    * <p>
521    * Parent and overriding-parent stores are <i>not</i> consulted.  This returns the supplier itself,
522    * unwrapped from any resolution chain &mdash; it lets callers promote a memoizer-backed default
523    * supplier into a higher-precedence layer (e.g. a local entry) without re-invoking the underlying
524    * factory.
525    *
526    * @param <T> The bean type.
527    * @param beanType The bean type to look up.
528    * @param name The bean name.  Can be <jk>null</jk> for unnamed beans.
529    * @return The locally-registered default supplier, or {@link Optional#empty()} if not present.
530    */
531   @SuppressWarnings({
532      "unchecked" // Cast is safe: parameterization is verified at construction.
533   })
534   public <T> Optional<Supplier<T>> getDefaultSupplier(Class<T> beanType, String name) {
535      var typeMap = defaults.get(beanType);
536      if (typeMap == null)
537         return opte();
538      var supplier = typeMap.get(emptyIfNull(name));
539      return supplier == null ? opte() : opt((Supplier<T>) supplier);
540   }
541
542   /**
543    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if this store contains at least one unnamed bean of the specified type.
544    *
545    * <p>
546    * If not found in this store, searches the parent store recursively.
547    *
548    * @param beanType The bean type to check.
549    * @return <jk>true</jk> if this store contains at least one unnamed bean of the specified type.
550    */
551   @Override
552   public boolean hasBean(Class<?> beanType) {
553      return hasBean(beanType, null);
554   }
555
556   /**
557    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if this store contains a bean of the specified type and name.
558    *
559    * <p>
560    * If not found in this store, searches the parent store recursively.
561    *
562    * @param beanType The bean type to check.
563    * @param name The bean name.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
564    * @return <jk>true</jk> if this store contains a bean of the specified type and name.
565    */
566   @Override
567   public boolean hasBean(Class<?> beanType, String name) {
568      return resolve(beanType, name).isPresent();
569   }
570
571   @Override
572   public <T> WritableBeanStore addBeanType(Class<T> beanType, Class<? extends T> implType) {
573      checkOpen();
574      typeBindings.put(beanType, implType);
575      return this;
576   }
577
578   @Override
579   @SuppressWarnings({
580      "unchecked" // Cast is safe: parameterization is verified at construction.
581   })
582   public <T> Optional<Class<? extends T>> getBeanType(Class<T> beanType) {
583      var v = (Class<? extends T>) typeBindings.get(beanType);
584      if (nn(v))
585         return opt(v);
586      if (nn(parent))
587         return parent.getBeanType(beanType);
588      return opte();
589   }
590
591   /**
592    * Returns the supplier for an unnamed bean of the specified type.
593    *
594    * <p>
595    * If no supplier is found in this store, searches the parent store recursively.
596    *
597    * @param <T> The bean type.
598    * @param beanType The bean type.
599    * @return The supplier, or {@link Optional#empty()} if no supplier of the specified type exists.
600    */
601   @Override
602   public <T> Optional<Supplier<T>> getBeanSupplier(Class<T> beanType) {
603      return getBeanSupplier(beanType, null);
604   }
605
606   /**
607    * Resolves a supplier for a bean of the specified type and name.
608    *
609    * <p>
610    * If no supplier with the specified name is found in this store, searches the parent store recursively.
611    *
612    * @param <T> The bean type.
613    * @param beanType The bean type.
614    * @param name The bean name.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
615    * @return The supplier, or {@link Optional#empty()} if no supplier of the specified type and name exists.
616    */
617   @SuppressWarnings({
618      "unchecked" // Type erasure requires cast for supplier resolution
619   })
620   protected <T> Optional<Supplier<T>> resolve(Class<T> beanType, String name) {
621      // (0) Push/pop overlay stack — wins over the construction-time overridingParent slot because pushed
622      // frames are "more recent".  Lazily initialized; null until the first pushOverlay() call.
623      var stack = overlayStack;
624      if (nn(stack) && stack.depth() > 0) {
625         var fromStack = stack.getBeanSupplier(beanType, name);
626         if (fromStack.isPresent())
627            return fromStack;
628      }
629      // (1) Overriding parent (e.g. Spring) — wins over local entries.
630      if (nn(overridingParent)) {
631         var fromOverriding = overridingParent.getBeanSupplier(beanType, name);
632         if (fromOverriding.isPresent())
633            return fromOverriding;
634      }
635      // (2) Local regular entries.
636      var typeMap = entries.get(beanType);
637      if (nn(typeMap)) {
638         var key = emptyIfNull(name);
639         var supplier = typeMap.get(key);
640         if (nn(supplier))
641            return opt((Supplier<T>)supplier);
642      }
643      // (3) Regular parent fallback.
644      if (nn(parent)) {
645         var fromParent = parent.getBeanSupplier(beanType, name);
646         if (fromParent.isPresent())
647            return fromParent;
648      }
649      // (4) Local default suppliers (memoizer-backed framework defaults).
650      var defaultMap = defaults.get(beanType);
651      if (nn(defaultMap)) {
652         var key = emptyIfNull(name);
653         var supplier = defaultMap.get(key);
654         if (nn(supplier))
655            return opt((Supplier<T>)supplier);
656      }
657      return opte();
658   }
659
660   /**
661    * Returns the supplier for a named bean of the specified type.
662    *
663    * <p>
664    * If no supplier with the specified name is found in this store, searches the parent store recursively.
665    *
666    * @param <T> The bean type.
667    * @param beanType The bean type.
668    * @param name The bean name.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
669    * @return The supplier, or {@link Optional#empty()} if no supplier of the specified type and name exists.
670    */
671   @Override
672   public <T> Optional<Supplier<T>> getBeanSupplier(Class<T> beanType, String name) {
673      checkOpen();
674      return resolve(beanType, name);
675   }
676
677   @Override
678   public WritableBeanStore registerConfiguration(Class<?> configType) {
679      checkOpen();
680      if (configType == null)
681         return this;
682      registerConfiguration(configType, registeredConfigurations);
683      return this;
684   }
685
686   /**
687    * Finds and invokes a factory method that produces a bean of type <c>beanType</c>.
688    *
689    * <p>
690    * If <c>onClassOrObject</c> is a {@link Class}, only static methods are eligible.
691    * Otherwise, both instance and static methods on the object's class are eligible.
692    * A <jk>null</jk> <c>filter</c> accepts any qualifying method.
693    *
694    * @param <T> The bean type.
695    * @param beanType The type of bean to create.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
696    * @param onClassOrObject The object instance or {@link Class} whose public methods are searched.
697    *    Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
698    * @param filter Optional predicate restricting which methods are eligible.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
699    * @param extraBeans Optional bean instances visible to parameter resolution for this call only.
700    * @return The created bean wrapped in an {@link Optional}, or {@link Optional#empty()} if no matching
701    *    factory method was found.
702    * @throws BeanCreationException If a matching method was found but threw an exception during invocation.
703    */
704   @Override
705   public <T> Optional<T> createBeanFromMethod(Class<T> beanType, Object onClassOrObject, Predicate<MethodInfo> filter, Object... extraBeans) {
706      Object resource = onClassOrObject instanceof Class ? null : onClassOrObject;
707      Class<?> resourceClass = onClassOrObject instanceof Class<?> c ? c : onClassOrObject.getClass();
708      return info(resourceClass)
709         .getPublicMethod(m ->
710            m.isNotDeprecated()
711            && m.hasReturnType(beanType)
712            && (filter == null || filter.test(m))
713            && (m.isStatic() || nn(resource))
714            && m.canResolveAllParameters(this, extraBeans))
715         .map(m -> {
716            try {
717               return m.<T>inject(this, resource, extraBeans);
718            } catch (Exception e) {
719               throw new BeanCreationException("Failed to create bean of type [" + beanType.getSimpleName() + "] via method [" + m.getName() + "]", e);
720            }
721         });
722   }
723
724   @Override /* Overridden from Object */
725   public String toString() {
726      return r(properties());
727   }
728
729   protected FluentMap<String,Object> properties() {
730      // @formatter:off
731      var entryList = list();
732      entries.forEach((type, typeMap) -> typeMap.forEach((name, supplier) -> entryList.add(filteredBeanPropertyMap()
733         .a(PROP_type, cns(type))
734         .a(PROP_bean, id(supplier.get()))
735         .a(PROP_name, name))));
736      var defaultList = list();
737      defaults.forEach((type, typeMap) -> typeMap.forEach((name, supplier) -> defaultList.add(filteredBeanPropertyMap()
738         .a(PROP_type, cns(type))
739         .a(PROP_bean, id(supplier.get()))
740         .a(PROP_name, name))));
741      Object overridingParentValue = null;
742      if (nn(overridingParent)) {
743         if (overridingParent instanceof BasicBeanStore op2)
744            overridingParentValue = op2.properties();
745         else
746            overridingParentValue = s(overridingParent);
747      }
748      var stack = overlayStack;
749      Object overlayStackValue = (nn(stack) && stack.depth() > 0) ? s(stack) : null;
750      return filteredBeanPropertyMap()
751         .a(PROP_entries, entryList)
752         .a(PROP_defaults, defaultList.isEmpty() ? null : defaultList)
753         .a(PROP_overlayStack, overlayStackValue)
754         .a(PROP_overridingParent, overridingParentValue)
755         .a(PROP_identity, id(this))
756         .a(PROP_parent, parent instanceof BasicBeanStore parent2 ? parent2.properties() : s(parent));
757      // @formatter:on
758   }
759
760   @Override
761   public void close() throws BeanCreationException {
762      if (closed)
763         return;
764      closed = true;
765      var errors = new BeanCreationException("Errors while invoking @PreDestroy callbacks.");
766      boolean hasErrors = false;
767      var beans = new ArrayList<>(resolvedBeans);
768      Collections.reverse(beans);
769      for (var bean : beans) {
770         for (var method : ClassInfo.of(bean).getAllMethods()) {
771            if (!method.getReturnType().is(void.class) || method.getParameterCount() != 0 || method.isAbstract() || method.isStatic())
772               continue;
773            if (method.getAnnotations().stream().noneMatch(JsrSupport::isPreDestroyAnnotation))
774               continue;
775            try {
776               method.invoke(bean);
777            } catch (Exception e) {
778               hasErrors = true;
779               errors.addSuppressed(e);
780            }
781         }
782      }
783      if (hasErrors)
784         throw errors;
785   }
786
787   @SuppressWarnings({
788      "unchecked" // reflective @Bean discovery — element types resolve at runtime to the value's actual class
789   })
790   private void registerConfiguration(Class<?> configType, Set<Class<?>> visited) {
791      if (!visited.add(configType))
792         return;
793      var cfg = configType.getAnnotation(Configuration.class);
794      if (cfg == null)
795         throw new BeanCreationException("Type is not @Configuration: " + configType.getName());
796      if (!matchesConditions(configType))
797         return;
798      // Annotation arrays cannot contain null elements at runtime — Java rejects null defaults at
799      // declaration time and the compiler refuses null literals in annotation values.  No defensive
800      // null check is needed here.
801      for (var imported : cfg.imports())
802         registerConfiguration(imported, visited);
803
804      // Walk the type and its superclasses; collect @Bean members on each level.  This honours
805      // the plan's "superclass inheritance of @Bean members" requirement.  Order matters here:
806      // process the highest ancestor first so subclass @Bean methods can depend on superclass
807      // beans (analogous to Spring's @Configuration inheritance).
808      Object instance = null;
809      var hierarchy = new ArrayList<Class<?>>();
810      for (var c = configType; c != null && c != Object.class; c = c.getSuperclass())
811         hierarchy.add(c);
812      Collections.reverse(hierarchy);
813      for (var c : hierarchy) {
814         for (var field : c.getDeclaredFields()) {
815            var beanAnn = field.getAnnotation(Bean.class);
816            if (beanAnn == null)
817               continue;
818            if (!matchesConditions(field))
819               continue;
820            try {
821               if (!java.lang.reflect.Modifier.isStatic(field.getModifiers()) && instance == null)
822                  instance = BeanInstantiator.of(configType, this).run();
823               field.setAccessible(true);
824               var value = field.get(java.lang.reflect.Modifier.isStatic(field.getModifiers()) ? null : instance);
825               addBeanWithMeta((Class<Object>)field.getType(), value, emptyIfNull(beanName(beanAnn)), BeanSourceMeta.from(field, beanAnn));
826            } catch (Exception e) {
827               throw new BeanCreationException("Failed to register @Bean field: " + field, e);
828            }
829         }
830         for (var method : c.getDeclaredMethods()) {
831            var beanAnn = method.getAnnotation(Bean.class);
832            if (beanAnn == null)
833               continue;
834            if (!matchesConditions(method))
835               continue;
836            try {
837               if (!java.lang.reflect.Modifier.isStatic(method.getModifiers()) && instance == null)
838                  instance = BeanInstantiator.of(configType, this).run();
839               method.setAccessible(true);
840               var value = MethodInfo.of(method).inject(this, java.lang.reflect.Modifier.isStatic(method.getModifiers()) ? null : instance);
841               addBeanWithMeta((Class<Object>)method.getReturnType(), value, emptyIfNull(beanName(beanAnn)), BeanSourceMeta.from(method, beanAnn));
842            } catch (Exception e) {
843               throw new BeanCreationException("Failed to register @Bean method: " + method, e);
844            }
845         }
846      }
847   }
848
849   private boolean matchesConditions(java.lang.reflect.AnnotatedElement element) {
850      var classLoader = element instanceof Class<?> c ? c.getClassLoader() : element.getClass().getClassLoader();
851      var ctx = new ConditionContext(this, Settings.get(), classLoader, element);
852      for (var c : element.getAnnotationsByType(Conditional.class)) {
853         if (!BeanInstantiator.of(c.value(), this).run().matches(ctx)) {
854            LOGGER.fine(() -> "Skipping conditional element due to @Conditional: " + element);
855            return false;
856         }
857      }
858      for (var c : element.getAnnotationsByType(ConditionalOnClass.class)) {
859         try {
860            Class.forName(c.value(), false, classLoader);
861         } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") ClassNotFoundException e) {
862            LOGGER.fine(() -> "Skipping conditional element due to missing class " + c.value() + ": " + element);
863            return false;
864         }
865      }
866      for (var c : element.getAnnotationsByType(ConditionalOnMissingBean.class)) {
867         var type = c.value();
868         var name = c.name().isEmpty() ? null : c.name();
869         if (type == Object.class) {
870            if (name != null && anyLocalBeanNamed(name))
871               return false;
872         } else if (hasBean(type, name)) {
873            return false;
874         }
875      }
876      for (var c : element.getAnnotationsByType(ConditionalOnProperty.class)) {
877         var value = Settings.get().get(c.name()).orElse(null);
878         if (value == null && !c.matchIfMissing())
879            return false;
880         if (value != null && !c.havingValue().isEmpty() && !c.havingValue().equals(value))
881            return false;
882      }
883      return true;
884   }
885
886   private boolean anyLocalBeanNamed(String name) {
887      var key = emptyIfNull(name);
888      return entries.values().stream().anyMatch(m -> m.containsKey(key))
889         || defaults.values().stream().anyMatch(m -> m.containsKey(key));
890   }
891
892   private String beanName(Bean bean) {
893      return bean.name().isEmpty() ? bean.value() : bean.name();
894   }
895
896   private <T> void addBeanWithMeta(Class<T> beanType, T bean, String name, BeanSourceMeta meta) {
897      var key = emptyIfNull(name);
898      // Duplicate-check against LOCAL entries only.  Beans present via the overridingParent or parent
899      // chain are allowed to coexist with a local registration here — the resolution order
900      // (overridingParent > local > parent > defaults) ensures the right entry wins at lookup time.
901      // This is what lets a test-time overlay installed in the overridingParent slot coexist with a
902      // local @Bean factory of the same (type, name) declared on a @Configuration class without
903      // triggering a spurious duplicate-bean error.
904      var typeMap = entries.computeIfAbsent(beanType, k -> new ConcurrentHashMap<>());
905      if (typeMap.containsKey(key))
906         throw new BeanCreationException("Duplicate bean: type=" + beanType.getName() + ", name=" + key);
907      typeMap.put(key, () -> bean);
908      entryMetadata.computeIfAbsent(beanType, k -> new ConcurrentHashMap<>()).put(key, meta);
909   }
910
911   private <T> T trackResolved(T bean) {
912      if (bean == null)
913         return null;
914      synchronized (resolvedIdentities) {
915         if (resolvedIdentities.add(bean))
916            resolvedBeans.add(bean);
917      }
918      return bean;
919   }
920
921   private <T> Optional<T> selectPrimary(Class<T> beanType) {
922      // @Primary is a local-entry-only signal.  Default suppliers added via addDefaultSupplier()
923      // always carry BeanSourceMeta.DEFAULT (primary = false), so iterating defaultMetadata never
924      // contributes a primary candidate — only entryMetadata is consulted here.  Parent and
925      // overridingParent stores (including Spring-backed delegates) are similarly excluded because
926      // @Primary metadata only exists on beans this store registered itself.
927      Set<String> primaryNames = new LinkedHashSet<>();
928      var em = entryMetadata.get(beanType);
929      if (nn(em))
930         em.forEach((name, meta) -> { if (meta.primary) primaryNames.add(name); });
931      if (primaryNames.isEmpty())
932         return opte();
933      if (primaryNames.size() > 1)
934         throw new BeanCreationException("Multiple @Primary candidates of type " + beanType.getName());
935      var primaryName = primaryNames.iterator().next();
936      return resolve(beanType, primaryName).map(Supplier::get);
937   }
938
939   private int beanOrder(Class<?> type, String name) {
940      // @Order / priority is sourced from registered entries only.  Default suppliers always carry
941      // BeanSourceMeta.DEFAULT (which already returns Integer.MAX_VALUE/2), so we fall through to
942      // the same constant rather than consulting defaultMetadata redundantly.
943      var key = emptyIfNull(name);
944      var m = entryMetadata.get(type);
945      if (m != null)
946         return m.getOrDefault(key, BeanSourceMeta.DEFAULT).orderValue();
947      return Integer.MAX_VALUE / 2;
948   }
949
950   private void checkOpen() {
951      if (closed)
952         throw new IllegalStateException("BeanStore has been closed.");
953   }
954
955   private static class BeanSourceMeta {
956      static final BeanSourceMeta DEFAULT = new BeanSourceMeta(false, null, Integer.MAX_VALUE / 2);
957      final boolean primary;
958      final Integer order;
959      final int priority;
960
961      BeanSourceMeta(boolean primary, Integer order, int priority) {
962         this.primary = primary;
963         this.order = order;
964         this.priority = priority;
965      }
966
967      int orderValue() {
968         return order == null ? priority : order.intValue();
969      }
970
971      static BeanSourceMeta from(java.lang.reflect.AnnotatedElement element, Bean bean) {
972         var order = element.getAnnotation(Order.class);
973         return new BeanSourceMeta(element.getAnnotation(Primary.class) != null, order == null ? null : order.value(), bean.priority());
974      }
975   }
976}
